title: Sea Glass
description: See 15 [blue]Cards[/blue] from another character. Choose any number of them to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Character-assigned relic that automatically selects a character when obtained (defaults to Ironclad if not explicitly set). Provides 5 Common, 5 Uncommon, and 5 Rare cards from the selected character's card pool for the player to choose from. Each selected card is added to the player's deck.
